zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Cornewall於1382年出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，他的父親Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford23歲，母親Cecilia Alice Merbury18歲。他於大約1405年與Alice Merbury在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利結婚。他去世於1437年在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫雷吉隆斯其可 可爾享年55歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫雷吉隆斯其可 可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cornewall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Cornewall was born in 1382, in Burford, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, was 23 and his mother, Cecilia Alice Merbury, was 18. He married Alice Merbury about 1405, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1437, in Cologne Region, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 55, and was buried in Cologne Region, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.St. Mary's, Burford, Shropshire, England: St Mary's Church, Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Cornewall est né en 1382, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Alice Merbury, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Alice Merbury environ 1405, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1437, à Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.St. Mary's, Burford, Shropshire, England: St Mary's Church, Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Cornewall 1382 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford 23 und seine Mutter Cecilia Alice Merbury 18. Er hat um 1405 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Merbury geheiratet. Er starb 1437 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Cornewall è nato il nel 1382 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Alice Merbury, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Alice Merbury circa 1405, nel Weobley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1437, nel Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ko.St. Mary's, Burford, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Cornewall(이)가 1382년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Alice Merbury(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 Alice Merbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1437년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 레기런그스베지르크 ko에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 레기런그스베지르크 ko에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Cornewall nasceu em 1382, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Alice Merbury, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Merbury aproximadamente 1405, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1437, em Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.St. Mary's, Burford, Shropshire, England: ст мэри'с чурч, бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Cornewall родился в 1382 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Alice Merbury, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Merbury около 1405 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1437 г. в местности региирунгсбезирк кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности региирунгсбезирк кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Cornewall nació en 1382, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Cecilia Alice Merbury, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Alice Merbury aproximadamente 1405, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1437, en Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Regierungsbezirk Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
